message:
Running command: # Log stuck 6+ min at 11:45. OpenROAD still at 99.9% CPU computing repair.
# This is analyzing the last 14100 violations with detailed slack analysis.
# Extended wait - 30 min then check again.

sleep 1800

echo "=== 30-min repair_design check: $(date) ==="
ps -p 363476 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
echo ""
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -15
echo ""
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
echo ""
ps aux | grep "openroad" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $8,$3,$4}' | head -2
stat -c "log size=%s mtime=%y" /tmp/librelane_final.log
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log
